text:
Watching Austin hit the barricade with the ATV may have been the best moment of the entire night. If anything, the Women’s Triple Threat was fun. The last minute Joe Hendry surprise got me out of my seat. Love that guy. He didn’t deserve to get buried that badly. We needed a few more minutes out of that and less Travis Scott. The final match was mid as hell, but that’s just me. Props to the fast surprise win from Dirty Dom. Personally want Finn Balor to get some more wins under his belt, but Dom’s heel work has been on another level and happy to see him get a major win.

But yes, they did Cody dirty, and the only way for this to get fixed is for an entire year of Cody going Mega Heel and being the best bad guy of all time. Also, can we talk about his Iron Man mask opening moment? Insanely cool.

replies.author: @LuigiTheMetal64
replies.text: @lunarianpaladin6980 People think there are more soccer players in the world than there are SNK fans. Even Metallica fans never rushed to be Netflix subscribers nor _Pokémon_ fans. That is why video games can only be catered to video game players. You can never make everything for everybody. _Guitar Hero_ having Slash, Tom Morello, DMC, and Aerosmith at least makes sense because _Guitar Hero_ is a series that involves licensed songs, implying that real life rockers exist in the world with the fictional characters.

replies.author: @LuigiTheMetal64
replies.text: @kyokugenryudisciple9349 Even still, we can not imagine how much money is being spent on, and there is a chance the video game will sell poorly on par with Capcom right now.
